title: helichrysum lanuginosum
intro: Helichrysum lanuginosum, also known as False Yellowhead, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Helichrysum lanuginosum is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils to harness its therapeutic properties.
